problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: Combining Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
